title: 20 Aluminium Foil Trays with Paper Lids – Round Foil Flan Dishes – Durable and Food Grade Tin Pie Cases – Oven and Freezer Safe – Baking Trays Containers - 9 inch-23cm
features: COOKING MADE EASY: Everyone can prepare delicious crumble of cheesecake with the Caterserve foil flan dishes! These amazing aluminium containers with lids are premium baking accessories that allow you to cook and store a wide variety of meals.

MULTIFUNCTIONAL: Our foil pie cases can be used in the oven or freezer, which allows you to cook delicious pies, crumbles, casseroles, and cheesecake. It comes with practical paper lids that protect the food from dust, debris, or ice, so you can store it virtually anywhere

ECO-FRIENDLY SOLUTION: Our foil containers are eazy to discad so you don’t have to deal with cleaning up. Don’t worry: although they are not reusable, our aluminium containers are recyclable, so you are not hurting the environment.

WHAT YOU GET: The Caterserve set includes 20 versatile foil trays for baking and 20 matching paper lids to keep food fresh and crisp. They are great for parties, Christmas, Thanksgiving, or whenever you want to bake something for your neighbours and don’t worry about returning the tray.

TOP-QUALITY DESIGN: Unlike other foil baking trays, ours are made with premium aluminium. This heavy-duty and strong material can withstand very high and low temperature. It is food-grade so you don’t need to worry about safety either.
